'''fodayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:uteroabdominal|uteroabdominal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uteroabdominal|uteroabdominal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fodayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || fodayithi || fodayiji || fodayishi || fodayiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || fodayuthu || fodayuju || fodayushu || fodayuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || fodayuthu || fodayuju || fodayushu || fodayuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || fodayufthuf || fodayufjuf || fodayufshuf || fodayufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fodayethe || fodayeje || fodayeshe || fodayeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fodayotho || fodayojo || fodayosho || fodayoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || fodayotho || fodayojo || fodayosho || fodayoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fodayofthof || fodayofjof || fodayofshof || fodayofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fodayïfthïf || fodayïfjïf || fodayïfshïf || fodayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fodayïfthïf || fodayïfjïf || fodayïfshïf || fodayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fodayïfthïf || fodayïfjïf || fodayïfshïf || fodayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fodayïfthïf || fodayïfjïf || fodayïfshïf || fodayïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fodayæthæ || fodayæjæ || fodayæshæ || fodayækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || fodayatha || fodayaja || fodayasha || fodayaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || fodayatha || fodayaja || fodayasha || fodayaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || fodayafthaf || fodayafjaf || fodayafshaf || fodayafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || fodayasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || fodayshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || fodayroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || fodaymuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || fodayyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofodaynkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofodaynkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofodaynkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofodaynkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || fodadayasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || fodadayshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || fodadayroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || fodadaymuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || fodadayyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofodadaynkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofodadaynkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofodadaynkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofodadaynkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || fedæyasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || fedæyshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || fedæyroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || fedæymuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || fedæyyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofedæynkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofedæynkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofedæynkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofedæynkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || fodfayasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || fodfayshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || fodfayroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || fodfaymuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || fodfayyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofodfaynkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofodfaynkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofodfaynkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofodfaynkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
